what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that associates an attachment identifier with a target board item in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: file has no body content beyond frontmatter
standouts: target uses a board:// URI scheme to reference item-285a372d
attachment_type board_items indicates a board-item linkage
notes: A bare attachment ledger entry that points a channel attachment to a board item, carrying only identity, type, target, and creation time.
questions: What content or role does board://item-285a372d represent?
Who or what process created this attachment?
Is the board:// URI resolvable within this system?
purpose_vs_actual: No explicit stated purpose is given; the file acts as a metadata link record, which matches its apparent role.
intention_signals: It seems intended to persist a durable, timestamped association between a channel attachment and a specific board item for later lookup or traceability.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI scheme to reference the target board item.
contribution: Provides a persistent, timestamped link between a channel attachment and a board item, supporting traceability without embedding the referenced content.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata record in the dragnet-development channel linking attachment att-b50f581e to board item item-285a372d with a creation timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record that a specific board item is attached to a channel memory entry for retrieval or audit.
